examples: For example, containerization is popular in international movement.
I think that containerization is one of the best transportation methods at present.
The growth of containerization has resulted in changes in transport patterns and practices.
Even in the U.S., with its relatively free economy, the disruptive technology of containerization faced established interests and practices.
Other metaphors, such as railroads and containerization, also work very well.
